latest.title: Nvidia's next-gen AI rack system delayed to 2028 on manufacturing snags, SemiAnalysis says
latest.summary: The reported delay adds to concerns that Nvidia's breakneck annual release cadence is colliding with manufacturing limits.
latest.details: The reported delay adds to concerns that Nvidia's breakneck annual release cadence is colliding with manufacturing limits.

latest.title: Some of the nation’s rich are letting AI teach their kids
latest.summary: Most Americans don't trust AI. It's proven that it doesn't know what safe toppings for pizza are. People don't even want to listen to AI music.

radar.title: Trump asked FIFA to review Balogun's World Cup game suspension: Reports

radar.title: China Frees Pastor Detained in Crackdown on Religion After Trump’s Urging
radar.summary: Ezra Jin Mingri was released nearly two months after President Trump raised his case with China’s leader, Xi Jinping, during a visit to Beijing.
